hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|json)$' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'src-tauri'; then npx biome check --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
hooks.description: Auto-format TypeScript/JSON files with Biome after edits

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'src-tauri/src/.*\.rs$'; then cd src-tauri && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings 2>&1 | grep '^error' | head -5; fi
hooks.description: Run cargo clippy on Rust file edits to catch lint issues immediately
